events.summary: Edition charter created for Faith in Mind (Xinxinming) critical edition. Goal: produce a freely-licensed critical text from multiple public-domain witnesses with full apparatus.
Witness T1 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum T1 (primary candidate for copy text).
Witness T2 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum T2.
Witness T3 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum T3.
Witness T4 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum T4.
Witness T5 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum T5.
Witness A1 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum A1.
Witness A2 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum A2.
Witness A3 identified during reconnaissance. Assigned siglum A3.
Witness set locked at 8 base witnesses: T1-T5 (textual witnesses) and A1-A3 (anthology/commentary witnesses). No further witnesses will be added to the base set without creating a new SPEC version.
Sigla frozen: T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, A1, A2, A3. These identifiers are now permanent and will not be reassigned.
T1 ranked as primary candidate for copy text. Final selection pending witness validation and download completion.
